bead.title: epic: bare-repo + escaping-symlink contamination
bead.description:
Two recurring repo-corruption bugs:
A) GIT_DIR inherited from hook context causes ~95 unsanitized exec.Command("git") callsites to mutate the wrong repo (core.bare flips, stray core.worktree).
B) registry/installer.go:symlinkSkills uses EvalSymlinks through a parent symlink, producing repo-escaping links that get committed and oscillate per machine.

Plan converged after 3 review rounds (fresh-eyes x2, codex x2). Implementation broken into beads B1-B8.
bead.acceptance: All child beads closed; ddx work --once with GIT_DIR=fakebare set leaves fakebare/.git/config byte-identical; .agents/skills/helix-* and .claude/skills/helix-* show no diff after fresh ddx install helix on a clean clone.
